arts.ttl: Arsenal consider two ex-players to replace Edu as search for sporting director continues
arts.sum: Despite the upheaval, co-chairman Josh Kroenke remains unfazed, expressing gratitude for Edu's contributions and emphasising that changes are part and parcel of the club's evolution. As he prepares to take on a new challenge leading Evangelos Marinakis' group of clubs, including Nottingham Forest, Arsenal are now on the hunt for his replacement.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Arsenal Preview: Predicted Lineups, How To Watch, Prediction and 40/1 Parimatch Offer
arts.sum: Arsenal make the trip across the capital to take on rivals Chelsea to round off the weekend’s Premier League action ahead of the international break. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a p...

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Arsenal Referee Stats: Michael Oliver's appointment spells bad news for Gunners
arts.sum: Chelsea will look to head into the international break in third place when they take on Arsenal at Stamford Bridge today. Victory will see the Blues move onto 21 points in England’s top tier thi...

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Arsenal Preview: Why is Raheem Sterling unable to face Chelsea today?
arts.sum: Arsenal make the trip across the capital to take on Chelsea this afternoon in a huge London Derby. Both teams are currently locked on 18 points after the Gunners’ dip in form saw them drop 10 po...

arts.ttl: Chelsea Injury News: Will Cole Palmer be fit to face Arsenal?
arts.sum: Chelsea host Arsenal on Sunday afternoon in a monster London derby to round off the Premier League action ahead of the international break. The question on everyone’s lip, however – Will C...

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes title admission as Arsenal identify missing piece transfer
arts.sum: Man City boss Pep Guardiola has warned his side that results have to change if they are to win their fifth Premier League title in a row ahead of Arsenal. For Arsenal, they know a win will bring them to within two points of title rivals Manchester City ahead of the third international break of the season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal full squad revealed for Chelsea as vital Declan Rice decision made as another misses out
arts.sum: Arsenal, who have just seen Martin Odegaard return to the matchday squad after two months away, know how it feels. Kai Havertz and Mikel Merino both picked up head injuries in the 1-0 loss to Inter on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes Arsenal title race admission amid Manchester City and Liverpool point
arts.sum: The Gunners' upcoming clash with Chelsea at Stamford Bridge has taken on added significance following a disappointing run of form which has seen them pick up just one point from their last three games. Mikel Arteta has suggested that there is no clear favourite for the Premier League title this season, despite Arsenal currently trailing leaders Liverpool by ten points.

arts.ttl: Pundits agree in Chelsea vs Arsenal prediction amid Cole Palmer doubt
arts.sum: Palmer has missed training this week after getting injured against Manchester United last weekend and Chelsea need him if they are going to win this. Chelsea welcome Arsenal to Stamford Bridge on Sunday afternoon as they look to break into the top-four and close the gap to Manchester City after their defeat at Brighton.

arts.ttl: Christopher Nkunku could leave Chelsea at the end of the season
